hero.title: Clear guidance for every family, in every language.
hero.description: Ethiospectrum helps families organize important documents, understand complicated information, and track their next steps in English, Amharic, or Spanish.
hero.trust: Built for information, organization, and practical next steps.
hero.galleryTitle: Every family story deserves room to grow.
hero.galleryDescription: A welcoming space for the everyday moments, questions, and milestones that shape a family’s path.
hero.classroomAlt: Children learning together in a classroom
hero.learningAlt: A child practicing a new skill
hero.journeyTitle: Small steps can carry a family forward.
hero.journeyDescription: Ethiospectrum makes room for each family’s pace, questions, and progress.
hero.journeyAlt: A child running outside on a sunny day

howItWorks.title: Bring the pieces of family care into one clear place.
howItWorks.stepOneDescription: Keep important records and family details together in a future private binder.
howItWorks.stepTwoDescription: Use plain-language explanations and clearly labeled information to prepare for decisions.
howItWorks.stepThreeDescription: Track next steps, dates, questions, and useful resources at your own pace.

features.title: Structure without the overwhelm.
features.documentsDescription: A planned secure home for records, paperwork, and important details.
features.assistantDescription: A planned tool for cited, plain-language document guidance—never a substitute for a professional.
features.roadmapDescription: A planned space for deadlines, questions, and manageable next steps.
features.resourcesDescription: Curated educational resources in the language that works for your family.

multilingual.eyebrow: Language should not be a barrier
multilingual.title: Choose the language that feels most natural.
multilingual.description: The foundation supports English, Amharic, and Spanish. Translation content is reviewed carefully before it is relied on for sensitive decisions.

documentAssistant.title: Questions deserve grounded answers.
documentAssistant.description: This planned assistant will distinguish document facts, general information, suggested next steps, and what it could not verify.
documentAssistant.notice: Document analysis is not active in this foundation.

digitalBinder.title: A place for the papers that matter.
digitalBinder.description: A future private binder will help your household keep records organized without turning files into a maze.

roadmap.title: Make the next step visible.
roadmap.description: A future roadmap will turn important dates and questions into a clear, flexible plan.

resources.title: Information that meets families where they are.
resources.description: Explore early educational resources while our reviewed library grows.
resources.resourceThree: Questions to bring to an appointment
resources.pageIntro: Browse educational material designed to help families prepare, organize, and ask informed questions.

privacy.title: Sensitive information deserves careful boundaries.
privacy.description: Ethiospectrum is being designed around private storage, server-side authorization, auditability, and minimal data use. This is an architecture commitment, not a compliance claim.
privacy.pageIntro: This draft describes product intentions and requires legal, privacy, and security review before any public launch.

pricing.title: Thoughtful support, with details to come.
pricing.description: Pricing and paid support are not available in this foundation. We will share clear options before any subscription service launches.
pricing.planDescription: No charge or purchase is available today.

callToAction.title: A more organized path starts with a clearer view.
callToAction.description: Explore the Ethiospectrum foundation and see how family guidance can become easier to navigate.

footer.description: Multilingual family-support foundation for organization, education, and next steps.

authentication.loginDescription: Sign in to return to your family workspace.
authentication.signupDescription: Create an account to begin using your private workspace.
authentication.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we will send password reset instructions if an account is available.
authentication.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
authentication.checkEmailDescription: Open the confirmation message we sent to continue.
authentication.resendConfirmationDescription: Enter your email address and we will send a new confirmation link if one is available.
authentication.confirmationResendNeutralSuccess: If a confirmation link can be sent to that email address, it is on its way.
authentication.authErrorTitle: We could not complete that request
authentication.expiredConfirmationLink: This confirmation link has expired. Request a new email to continue.
authentication.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
authentication.sessionExpired: Your recovery session has expired. Request a new password reset email.
authentication.accessDenied: You do not have access to that area.
authentication.genericError: We could not complete that request. Please try again.
authentication.emailRateLimit: Too many confirmation emails were requested. Please try again later.
authentication.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
authentication.emailConfirmationRequired: Confirm your email before signing in.
authentication.recoveryNeutralSuccess: If an account is available for that email address, password reset instructions have been sent.
authentication.termsRequired: You must acknowledge the terms and privacy notice.
authentication.termsAcknowledgement: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Notice.

dashboard.intro: This is sample content showing how a future household dashboard may be organized.

emptyStates.documentsTitle: Your binder is ready when you are
emptyStates.documentsDescription: Upload private documents to your binder, then choose when to process eligible files.
emptyStates.assistantTitle: Ask about a document when analysis is available
emptyStates.assistantDescription: The future assistant will show sources and page citations for supported answers.
emptyStates.roadmapDescription: Future reminders and deadlines will appear here.
emptyStates.dependentsDescription: Household profiles are planned for a later phase.
emptyStates.supportDescription: Human support and appointments are not connected yet.

errors.notFoundTitle: We could not find that page
errors.notFoundDescription: The page may have moved, or the address may be incomplete.
errors.protectedDescription: Sign in to continue to this private area.

marketingPages.featuresIntro: See the planned tools and the safety boundaries guiding their design.
marketingPages.howItWorksIntro: Ethiospectrum is designed to help families move from scattered information to understandable next steps.
marketingPages.termsIntro: These draft terms explain the boundaries of this early product foundation and need professional review.

legal.draftNotice: Draft content for professional review — it does not state legal compliance.
legal.privacyBody: Ethiospectrum is intended to collect only what is needed for its services, protect private family information, and provide meaningful controls. Final policies, retention periods, and legal obligations will be reviewed before launch.
legal.termsBody: Ethiospectrum provides educational, informational, and organizational support. It does not provide legal, medical, immigration, or professional advice, representation, eligibility decisions, or guaranteed outcomes.

member.logoutNotice: Sign out securely from your workspace.
member.onboardingDescription: Guided household setup is planned. Nothing is saved in this foundation.
member.settingsDescription: Language, profile, and household settings are planned for a future release.

onboarding.title: Set up your household
onboarding.description: Name your family workspace and confirm how Ethiospectrum handles the information you choose to store.
onboarding.householdNameHelp: This name identifies your family workspace to invited members. Use up to 160 characters.
onboarding.householdNameError: Enter a household name of up to 160 characters.
onboarding.consentNotice: Ethiospectrum stores the household details you provide to organize your family's information. Access is limited to your household members, and you can request deletion at any time.
onboarding.consentLabel: I agree to the storage of these household details.
onboarding.consentError: Please confirm the consent statement to continue.
onboarding.genericError: We could not save your household right now. Please try again.
onboarding.completeDescription: "{householdName}" is set up. You can manage your family's information from your dashboard.

dependents.title: Family members
dependents.description: Manage the people in your household who receive family support.
dependents.notesHelp: Keep notes limited to practical family-support information. Do not include medical or government identifiers.
dependents.archiveConfirm: Archive this dependent profile? It will no longer appear in active household lists.
dependents.emptyDescription: Add a dependent when you are ready.
dependents.accessDenied: You do not have permission to manage family members.
dependents.notFound: We could not find that dependent profile.
dependents.birthYearError: Enter a valid birth year that is not in the future.
dependents.saveError: We could not save this dependent profile. Please try again.
dependents.archiveError: We could not archive this dependent profile. Please try again.
dependents.permissionOwnerAdministrator: Owners and household administrators can make changes.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Store household documents privately and share access only with active household members.
documents.binderDescription: Search and organize private household document metadata. File contents are not searched.
documents.fileRequirements: PDF, DOCX, or TXT only. Maximum {size}.
documents.uploadFailed: We could not complete that upload. Please try again.
documents.processingAccessDenied: You do not have permission to process this document.
documents.processingAlreadyQueued: This document is already queued for processing.
documents.processingStarted: This document is queued for processing.
documents.extractionUnavailable: Text extraction is not available for this document.
documents.archiveConfirm: Archive this document? The file will remain in protected storage for retention processing.
documents.emptyDescription: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT document to add it to your private household binder.
documents.accessDenied: You do not have permission to upload documents for this household.
documents.notFound: We could not find that document.
documents.searchHint: Search titles, file names, or categories
documents.mobileFiltersDescription: Choose filters, then apply them to update the document binder.
documents.noMatchingDocumentsDescription: Try changing or clearing one or more filters.
documents.binderErrorTitle: We could not load the document binder.
documents.binderErrorDescription: Please try again. Your private documents remain protected.
documents.binderAccessDenied: You do not have access to documents for an active household.
documents.dependentError: Choose a family member from your active household.
documents.unsupportedFile: Choose a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file.
documents.fileTooLarge: Choose a file no larger than 20 MB.
documents.prepareError: We could not prepare that upload. Please try again.
documents.archiveError: We could not archive that document. Please try again.
documents.processingRequired: Processing is required before a summary can be generated.
documents.ocrRequired: OCR is required before a summary can be generated.
documents.summaryTranslationVerification: Amharic and Spanish summaries require native-speaker review and should be verified against the original document.
documents.summaryAccessDenied: You do not have permission to generate a summary for this document.
documents.summaryRequestFailed: We could not prepare that summary. Please try again.
documents.summaryProcessingRequired: Processing is required before a summary can be generated.
documents.summaryOcrRequired: OCR is required before a summary can be generated.
documents.summaryReadOnly: You can view an existing summary, but cannot generate a new one.
documents.summaryNoContent: This document does not contain enough extracted text to summarize.

admin.title: Administration workspace
admin.description: This separate shell establishes a future server-side role boundary. Administrative actions are unavailable in the foundation.

protected.developmentNotice: Protected routes require a verified server-side session.

review.translation: Translation requires native-speaker review before use for sensitive content.
